name: KodRxCapabilityStatement
title: KodRx FHIR Capability Statement
description: CapabilityStatement for the KodRx FHIR R4 implementation focused on verified digital prescriptions with provenance and traceability.

rest.documentation: KodRx currently provides FHIR R4 export capabilities for verified prescription Bundles. Full RESTful FHIR server capabilities are planned for future versions.

resource.documentation: Patient resource used to represent the prescription patient.
Practitioner resource used to represent the prescribing clinician.
MedicationRequest resource used to represent each prescribed medication.
Observation resource used to represent vital signs associated with the prescription.
Condition resource used to represent the diagnosis associated with the prescription.
Provenance resource used to represent KodRx traceability, including hash, block and prescription identifier extensions.
